zh-CN.name: 字母O
zh-CN.intro: 字母O是英文字母表里的第十五个字母。它看起来像一个圆圆的大泡泡，也像一个大大的鸡蛋。O的发音很圆润，嘴巴圆圆的。

story.title: ⚪圆圆的字母O
story.body: 看！一个大大的泡泡飘过来了，它是什么？是字母O！字母O圆圆的，像太阳公公，像圆圆的饼干，还像小车轮子。小猫咪看见字母O，以为是一颗圆圆的毛线球，扑上去一滚，O就转了起来。O滚呀滚，遇到小朋友，小朋友说：‘O，你好！’O笑道：‘嘴巴圆圆，跟我读/ō/！’于是小朋友一起张大嘴巴：‘ō～’O可开心了，它最喜欢和小朋友们一起做游戏了！晚上，O变成了一轮圆圆的月亮，挂在天上，照亮了小朋友回家的小路。

knowledge.title: 字母O是从哪里来的？
knowledge.body: 字母O是英文字母表里第十五个字母。它是元音字母，发音时嘴巴要张得圆圆的。很多单词里都有O，比如橙子（orange）和章鱼（octopus）。

en.name: O
en.intro: O is the fifteenth letter of the alphabet. It looks like a big round bubble or a big egg. It makes a round 'oh' sound.

story.title: ⚪The Round Letter O
story.body: Look! A big bubble is floating over. What is it? It's the letter O! O is round like the sun, like a cookie, and like a little wagon wheel. A little kitten saw O and thought it was a ball of yarn, so she pounced and O rolled away. O rolled and rolled and met a little boy who said, 'Hello, O!' O smiled and said, 'Make your mouth round, say /oʊ/ with me!' So all the children opened their mouths wide and said, 'Oh~' O was so happy—it loves playing with kids! At night, O turned into a round, bright moon, shining down to light the children's way home.

knowledge.title: Where does the letter O come from?
knowledge.body: O is the 15th letter of the alphabet. It is a vowel, and you make a round mouth to say it. It appears in words like 'orange' and 'octopus'.
